---
name: Feature request / API change (RFC)
about: Propose an addition or change. Zoijs's API is frozen — additions need an RFC.
labels: rfc
---

## Problem

<!-- What can't you do today, or what's awkward? -->

## Proposal

<!-- The smallest possible change. Zoijs keeps a tiny API — prefer userland
     solutions or docs over new framework surface. -->

## Why it belongs in the core

<!-- Zoijs says no to most additions on purpose. Why can't this live in user
     code or an optional package? How does it stay aligned with: no build step,
     no JSX/VDOM, small API, beginner-friendly, secure by default? -->

## Alternatives considered

## Breaking? 

- [ ] This is purely additive (MINOR)
- [ ] This changes existing behavior/signature (MAJOR — needs strong justification)
